subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by the name of Him through Whom the lamp of Thine utterance was lit in the niche of Thy knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئللک باسمک الذی به اضاء مصباح بیانک فی مشکاه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
